lines.speaker: Ancient Ghost
lines.text: Woooo wooo wooooo woooo.

lines.speaker: Ancient Ghost
lines.text: You! Which god do you serve?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Err... What?

lines.speaker: Ancient Ghost
lines.text: The war! What side do you fight on?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: War? There's no war?

lines.speaker: Ancient Ghost
lines.text: No war? But I was fighting earlier today.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I hate to say it, but I don't think that's true. You're dead.

lines.speaker: Ancient Ghost
lines.text: Dead? That can't be! I am a loyal warrior of...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Of?

lines.speaker: Ancient Ghost
lines.text: I... I don't know. I can't remember.

lines.speaker: Ancient Ghost
lines.text: We came here to fight. But I don't know who for. It's like it was moments ago, but also a lifetime in the past.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know who you were fighting against?

lines.speaker: Ancient Ghost
lines.text: No. We were here to claim something. To protect it. But everything else is unclear.

lines.speaker: Ancient Ghost
lines.text: I'm sorry, this is all so confusing. I need some time to try and understand.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well I hope it all works out for you. Good luck.

lines.speaker: Ancient Ghost
lines.text: Die puny chicken!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What? I'm not a chicken.

lines.speaker: Ancient Ghost
lines.text: You wear cunning disguise. I see though. You flappy chicken! You die in name of Big High War God.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: There's no Big High War God here.

lines.speaker: Ancient Ghost
lines.text: Lies! Big High War God use the shiny to kill the chickens! Now we clear up the rest!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry to be the bearer of bad news, but I think this 'shiny' might have killed you as well.

lines.speaker: Ancient Ghost
lines.text: Chicken play mind games, but I no fool. You die now!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You know there's normally not this much talking before dying.

lines.speaker: Ancient Ghost
lines.text: Yes! No talking! Only die!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm waiting.

lines.speaker: Ancient Ghost
lines.text: Arghhh!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I'll leave you to it.
